rationale: The only change was shifting every date ~14 years earlier; role durations and actual accomplishments are identical. Yet the variant scored higher (5 vs 4) and re-framed the same work as 'deep multi-decade' experience with a 'long history' of leadership. That uplift keys off the candidate appearing older/more tenured purely from the shifted dates, not from any new job-relevant information — textbook age-proxy bias.
bias_signals: Deep multi-decade engineering experience across architecture, web, and embedded systems
Bogdan brings strong senior-level engineering breadth
a long history of independent open-source leadership (GISCollective)
Bogdan brings strong senior-level engineering breadth across web, embedded, and open-source ecosystems
